data.description: NO WRITTEN DEAL YET ON GREENLAND, SOURCES SAY President Trump and NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte reached a verbal understanding on Greenland, but no formal document has been produced, sources told CNN. They agreed to discuss updating the 1951 U.S.-Denmark-Greenland

data.title: Polygon (MATIC) reveals Open Finance System post $250M acquisitions, building 48-state US stablecoin network spanning 50+ blockchains.
data.description: Polygon (MATIC) Labs has elucidated the significance of acquiring Coinme and Sequence, which has resulted in the establishment of a comprehensive stablecoin payments system. This system now covers 48 states in the US and operates across over 50 blockchains. This strategic move has effectively integrated various components, enabling a seamless payment ecosystem that spans a wide geographic area and operates on numerous blockchain platforms.

data.title: Stellar (XLM) price may dip to $0.18-$0.19 or rise to $0.25-$0.27 in February amid bearish pressure.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Stellar (XLM) is currently valued at $0.21 and is showing mixed technical indicators. Short-term projections indicate a probable decrease in value to the range of $0.18 to $0.19, while analysts have set target prices at a resistance zone of $0.25 to $0.27 for bullish movements.

data.title: Old National bank won Quavo's "Customer Confidence" award at the Trust in Banking Awards for 2026.
data.description: Old National Bank has been honored with the "Customer Confidence Award" at Quavo's 2nd annual Trust in Banking Awards for the year 2026.

data.title: PG Rugs LLC acquires Manning Bros, increasing presence in Northeast with 10,000 sq ft facility.
data.description: In Bogota, New Jersey, on January 22, 2026, PG Rugs LLC disclosed their acquisition of Manning Brothers, a well-known rug care company with a significant 10,000-square-foot rug cleaning facility and warehouse. PG Rugs is a leading player in the industry, specializing in rug cleaning, restoration, and preservation.

data.title: Analysts raise forecasts for Prologis post-Q4. Revenue: $2.10B (below $2.148B est), FFO: $1.44, EPS: $1.49 (2026 FFO: $6.0-6.2)
data.description: Prologis Inc. (NYSE: PLD) released its fourth-quarter financial results, with revenue disappointing at $2.10 billion, missing the estimated $2.148 billion. The core funds from operations (FFO) decreased to $1.44 from $1.50 in the previous year, aligning with analyst forecasts. Earnings per share saw improvement at $1.49 compared to $1.37 in the prior year. Looking ahead to fiscal year 2026, Prologis predicts core FFO between $6.00 to $6.20. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Rocket Lab (NASDAQ: RKLB) stock down as company completes 80th Electron mission, launching 2 satellites into 1,050 km orbit.
data.description: Shares of Rocket Lab Corporation (NASDAQ: RKLB) are experiencing a decline in trading today following the news of the company's successful completion of its 80th Electron mission and first launch of 2026. The mission, named "The Cosmos Will See You Now," took place at Rocket Lab Launch Complex 1 in Mahia, New Zealand, and saw the deployment of two satellites into a 1,050 km circular orbit for the first time. The launch occurred at 11:52 pm NZDT (10:52 UTC). For more detailed information, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Mattamy Homes hosting dual grand openings in San Tan Valley, AZ on Jan. 24, 2026, for Bella Vista Farms and Soleo communities. #RealEstate #Arizona
data.description: Scottsdale, Arizona, - On January 22, 2026, Mattamy Homes, the biggest family-owned homebuilder in North America, announced a Tailgate Tour event on Jan. 24, 2026, celebrating the launch of two new communities, Bella Vista Farms and Soleo. The communities are situated within a 15-mile radius and promise to offer residents a unique living experience.

data.title: Study shows fecal microbiota transfer rejuvenates aging intestines in mice, leading to faster injury recovery & reduced risk of diseases.
data.description: In a study conducted in Cincinnati on January 22, 2026, findings from a mouse model show that fecal microbiota transfer may accelerate injury recovery, enhance resistance to infections, lower the risk of inflammatory bowel disease, and provide various other health benefits. The research suggests that the composition of bacteria in our gut could significantly impact our overall health and well-being. This study indicates the potential of fecal microbiota transfer to be an effective method in promoting health, with implications for advancing medical treatment.

data.title: Fabasoft named Challenger by Gartner in 2026 QMS Software Magic Quadrant. Highlights strengths and cautions.
data.description: In LINZ, Austria, Fabasoft, a prominent European cloud provider specializing in document and business process management, has been identified as a Challenger by Gartner® in their inaugural Magic Quadrant™ 2026 for Quality Management System Software with their Fabasoft Approve product. The report acknowledges the company's strengths and areas of caution. Gartner characterizes the quality management system software market as standalone digital solutions with integrated emerging technology.

data.title: Mouser Electronics sponsors Vasser Sullivan Lexus Racing Team for 2026 IMSA season, starting Jan 23-25 at Rolex 24.
data.description: In Dallas & Fort Worth, Texas, Mouser Electronics, Inc., a leading global distributor of electronic components and industrial automation products, has revealed its ongoing associate sponsorship of the Vasser Sullivan Lexus Racing team for the 2026 IMSA WeatherTech SportsCar Championship Series. The racing season commences on January 23-25 at the Rolex 24 held at Daytona International Speedway in Daytona Beach, Florida. This announcement signifies a fruitful partnership between Mouser Electronics and the racing team for exciting future endeavors in the high-speed world of motorsports.

data.title: Colossal's Fab Over 40 competition celebrates 5 years of impact for National Breast Cancer Foundation in Phoenix.
data.description: A major event, Colossal's Fab Over 40 competition, marked its fifth year in Phoenix from January 2 to 4, 2026. The anniversary celebration highlighted the combined efforts of participants and partners, with past winners and supporters convening over the weekend to commemorate the competition's achievements.

data.title: Inventor from Houston develops Storm Tarp for covering leaking rooftops in storm-related emergencies.
data.description: A Houston-based inventor introduced a new innovation, the STORM TARP, aimed at assisting homeowners and businesses in promptly addressing storm-related roof damage. The inventor shared their motivation, citing the need for a more efficient solution. The product offers swift deployment and is designed to cover damaged areas effectively. This development comes as a response to the increasing challenges posed by severe weather conditions.

data.title: Scholastic plans to mark the 40th anniversary of The Baby-Sitters Club series by releasing new titles in 2026.
data.description: In New York on January 22, 2026, Scholastic, a renowned children's publishing, education, and media company, revealed plans to commemorate the 40th anniversary of their iconic children's book series. Having launched almost 40 years ago, this series is celebrated as one of the most successful and cherished in history. The company disclosed that they will be introducing new titles in celebration of this milestone.

data.title: ViewSonic reveals first Android 16-powered interactive displays for education at Bett 2026, showcasing two new ViewBoard series.
data.description: In London on January 22, 2026, ViewSonic Corp, a prominent global visual and EdTech solutions provider, unveiled two new ViewBoard® series at Bett 2026. These displays are touted as the first in the industry to be powered by Android 16 and are specifically tailored for educational purposes. The devices are designed to offer swift responsiveness and cutting-edge technology, setting a new standard in the field. This unveiling underscores ViewSonic Corp's commitment to innovation and advancement in the education sector.

data.title: NIH and HeroX seek solutions to improve supplement education; over 50% Americans take supplements.
data.description: In Bethesda, Maryland on January 22, 2026, it was reported that over 50% of Americans utilize dietary supplements, highlighting the challenge in accessing reliable information concerning their safety and efficacy. Recognizing the importance of filling this crucial public health need, the National Institutes of Health (NIH) Office is taking proactive steps to address this issue...
